expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank with no visible label or icon, making its purpose unclear.
The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the fine print/legal copy near the bottom of the promotional section, obscuring important content.
The fine print/legal disclaimer is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on a mobile-sized screen.
The bottom sticky navigation sits very close to the promotional legal text, making the lower content feel cramped.
The top header contains several logos and elements packed tightly together, which makes the navigation area feel cluttered on mobile.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 describes a blank button in the top-right header with no visible label or icon, which matches the missing text on a top nav button.
